title: Cave Overhaul
description: Wicked new noise caves for a wild new adventure
body:
_Unofficial fork of WF's Cave Overhaul_
## Ready to play, no configuration needed

_Cave Overhaul_ Provides brand new caves without requiring any configuration or client-side mods. Just place the mod in your mod folder and you're set. Optional Mod Menu + Cloth Config support is available for those who want to tinker with the mod's noise cave generation.

## Optimized for gameplay first, aesthetics second

These new caves are designed to foster an engaging caving experience. Set sail through massive underground rivers. Get helplessly lost in _Cave Overhaul's_ 'labyrinthine' caves, which are designed to get you turned around. As you wander, you'll encounter everything from claustrophobic tunnels to large, expansive caverns.

## Lightning Fast Generation

They're fast, too - clocking in at a screaming 5 second difference between Cave Overhaul and Minecraft's native caves when making a new world. _Cave Overhaul_ achieves this by replacing all of Minecraft's carver-based caves with custom noise caves, leveraging all the performance optimizations Mojang designed for their noise-based system. 

## Minecraft's underground is now more dynamic than ever

These aren't your standard noise caverns. They use domain warping - a technique that modifies the nature of regular noise to achieve new and wacky effects. As you dive deeper, the terrain gets progressively weirder.

## Every cave is a new experience

...and more experiences are on the way. The goal of this mod is to ensure no two caving adventures are the same. Stay tuned to see what's in store and how I plan to make your cave adventures even more chaotic!
